info.title: CamposCloud API Documentation
info.description: This documentation provides an overview of the CamposCloud API, including authentication, endpoints, and data structures. It is designed to help developers integrate with the CamposCloud platform effectively.

get.description: Returns the user information for the authenticated user
Downloads a file from an application by its ID

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: ID of the application to download the file from

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The path of the file to download

404.description: Not Found – application or file not found

get.description: Returns information about a specific application by its ID

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: ID of the application to retrieve

get.description: Returns a list of applications for the authenticated user, with optional pagination and filtering by team

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number to retrieve (for pagination)

post.description: Starts an application by its ID

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: ID of the application to start

post.description: Stops an application by its ID

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: ID of the application to stop

post.description: Restarts an application by its ID

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: ID of the application to restart

delete.description: Deletes an application by its ID

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: ID of the application to delete

post.description: Updates an application by its ID

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: ID of the application to update

get.description: Retrieves the files of an application by its ID

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: ID of the application to retrieve files from

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The path within the application to retrieve files from. If not provided, retrieves files from the root directory.

delete.description: Deletes files from an application by its ID

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: ID of the application to delete files from

requestBody.description: List of file paths to delete

post.description: Uploads a file to the specified application

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: ID of the application to upload the file to

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The path within the application where the file will be uploaded. If not provided, the file will be uploaded to the root directory of the application.

post.description: Information about a new plant added to the store

200.description: Return a 200 status to indicate that the data was received successfully

_id.description: The unique identifier of the user

isEmail2FAEnabled.description: Indicates if the user has enabled email two-factor authentication

hasClaimedFreePlan.description: Indicates if the user has claimed the free plan

activeSessions.description: List of active sessions for the user

_id.description: The unique identifier of the application

containerId.description: The unique identifier of the container

teamId.description: The unique identifier of the team associated with the application

restartRequired.description: Indicates if a restart is required for the application

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the application

allocatedMemoryMB.description: The amount of memory allocated to the application in MB

allocatedVCpu.description: The number of virtual CPUs allocated to the application

_id.description: The unique identifier of the worker node

nodeName.description: The name of the worker node

containerImage.description: The Docker image used for the application

exposedViaWeb.description: Indicates if the application is exposed via the web

startupCommand.description: The command used to start the application

installDependenciesCmd.description: The command used to install dependencies for the application

runtimeEnvironment.description: The runtime environment of the application

autoRestartEnabled.description: Indicates if auto-restart is enabled for the application

status.description: The current status of the application

environmentVariables.description: List of environment variables set for the application

key.description: The name of the environment variable

value.description: The value of the environment variable

_id.description: The unique identifier of the environment variable

createdAt.description: The date and time when the application was created

updatedAt.description: The date and time when the application was last updated

externalPort.description: The external port exposed by the application, null if the application is not exposed via the web

assignedCustomDomain.description: The custom domain assigned to the application, null if no custom domain is assigned

_id.description: The unique identifier of the application

containerId.description: The unique identifier of the container

_id.description: The unique identifier of the team associated with the application

name.description: The name of the team associated with the application

owner.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the team associated with the application

members.description: The list of members in the team associated with the application

user.description: The unique identifier of the user who is a member of the team associated with the application

permissions.description: List of permissions assigned to the team member

canCreateApplication.description: Define if the team member can create applications in the team

canDeleteApplication.description: Define if the team member can delete applications in the team

canUpdateApplicationSettings.description: Define if the team member can update application settings in the team

canChangeStatusApplication.description: Define if the team member can change application status in the team

canManageApplicationBackup.description: Define if the team member can manage application backups in the team

canEditApplicationFiles.description: Define if the team member can edit application files in the team

canSeeApplicationFiles.description: Define if the team member can see application files in the team

canDeleteApplicationFiles.description: Define if the team member can delete application files in the team

canCreateDatabase.description: Define if the team member can create databases in the team

canDeleteDatabase.description: Define if the team member can delete databases in the team

canUpdateDatabaseSettings.description: Define if the team member can update database settings in the team

canChangeStatusDatabase.description: Define if the team member can change database status in the team

_id.description: The unique identifier of the team member

invites.description: The list of invites to the team associated with the application

email.description: The email of the invited user to the team associated with the application

userId.description: The unique identifier of the invited user to the team associated with the application, null if the user has not created an account yet

invitedAt.description: The date and time when the user was invited to the team associated with the application

code.description: The unique code associated with the invite to the team associated with the application, used for accepting the invite

permissions.description: List of permissions assigned to the team member

isDirectory.description: Indicates if the current path is a directory

content.description: Content of the current file. If the current path is a directory, this will be null.

files.description: List of files and directories in the current path, if the current path is a directory or null if it is a file

prevPath.description: The previous path in the file system. If the current path is the root directory, this will be null.

currentPath.description: The current path in the file system

name.description: The name of the file or directory

isDirectory.description: Indicates if the item is a directory

isFile.description: Indicates if the item is a file

path.description: The path of the file or directory

size.description: The size of the file in bytes, null for directories

createdAt.description: The date and time when the file or directory was created

modifiedAt.description: The date and time when the file or directory was last modified
